scripts.lint: yarn workspace @ax-studio/core lint && yarn workspace @ax-studio/web-app lint
scripts.test:prepare: yarn build:icon && yarn copy:assets:tauri && yarn build --no-bundle
scripts.dev:tauri: yarn build:icon && yarn copy:assets:tauri && tauri dev
scripts.copy:assets:tauri: rimraf "src-tauri/resources/pre-install/*.tgz" || true && cp pre-install/*.tgz src-tauri/resources/pre-install/ && cp LICENSE src-tauri/resources/ && cp NOTICE src-tauri/resources/
scripts.build:tauri:darwin: yarn download:bin && yarn tauri build --target universal-apple-darwin
scripts.build:tauri: yarn build:icon && yarn copy:assets:tauri && yarn download:bin && node scripts/tauri-build.mjs
scripts.build:tauri:plugin:api: cd src-tauri/plugins && yarn install && yarn workspaces foreach -Apt run build
scripts.build:core: cd core && yarn build && yarn pack
scripts.build:extensions: rimraf ./pre-install/*.tgz || true && yarn workspace @ax-studio/core build && cd extensions && yarn install && yarn workspaces foreach -Apt run build:publish
